content: GitHub (official changelog, June 2025) now automatically computes and displays SHA256 digests for every uploaded release asset with zero extra publisher effort — visible in the Releases UI, REST API, GraphQL API, and 'gh release view'. Best practice on top of this: also publish a human-readable SHA256SUMS.txt asset per release (generated via shasum -a 256 in the release script) so non-technical users following written instructions can verify without using the GitHub API.
